manifest.title: Game Streamer
manifest.author: bstrana
manifest.description: Baseball game live display overlay manager for OBS streaming. Manage matches and generate transparent scoreboard overlays powered by WBSC live data.
manifest.tagline: Baseball scoreboard overlay for OBS streaming
manifest.changelog: Add environment variable configuration for Keycloak and app URL via Cloudron Configure panel.

manifest.title: Game Streamer

manifest.changelog: Load runtime config from /app/data/config.env on startup; a sample file is written on first boot.

manifest.title: Game Streamer
manifest.author: bstrana
manifest.description: Baseball game live display overlay manager for OBS streaming. Manage matches and generate transparent scoreboard overlays powered by WBSC live data.
manifest.tagline: Baseball scoreboard overlay for OBS streaming
manifest.changelog: Direct overlay URL /overlay/game/:gameId — no match setup needed, team config via query params; OBS Lua script to auto-create Browser Source; right-align player names; broader pitch count key fallbacks.
